# Adrian Robert Minut — Academic Website

> Personal research site for Adrian Robert Minut, CS PhD student at Sapienza University of Rome.

## Site Structure

- `/` — Bio and contact information
- `/publications/` — Peer-reviewed publications and preprints
- `/posts/` — Research blog with technical posts on LLMs, model merging, and uncertainty estimation

## Research Focus

- Model merging for Large Language Models
- Uncertainty estimation in LLMs
- Variational inference

## Key Publications

- *Spilled Energy in Large Language Models* — ICLR 2026
- *MERGE³: Efficient Evolutionary Merging on Consumer-grade GPUs* — ICML 2025
- *Mergenetic: a Simple Evolutionary Model Merging Library* — ACL 2025

## Contact

minut@di.uniroma1.it
